Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class AbstractTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractTranslatorTests, DocTests, PartitionExpanderTests, SmartFactoryTests, TestAST, TestBA, TestBoundIdentRenaming, TestConflictResolver, TestConstructor, TestConstructorBuilder, TestDatatypeParser, TestDatatypes, TestDeBruijn, TestEquals, TestErrors, TestExprTypeChecker, TestExtensionTranslation, TestFactoryCreation, TestFactoryTranslation, TestFIS, TestFormulaFactory, TestFormulaSpecialization, TestFreeIdents, TestFreshNameSolver, TestGenParser, TestGivenTypes, TestIdentRenaming, TestLexer, TestLocation, TestOrigin, TestParser, TestPredicateVariables, TestSetInstantiation, TestSourceLocation, TestSpecialization, TestSpecializationClone, TestSubstituteFormula, TestTranslationFactory, TestTypeChecker, TestTypeCheckError, TestTypedConstructor, TestTypedGeneric, TestTypedIdentDecl, TestTypeInstantiation, TestTypenvSpecialization, TestTypes, TestTypeSpecialization, TestUnparse, TestVersionUpgrader, TestWD, TestWDStrict
public abstract class AbstractTests extends Object
Base abstract class for AST tests.

    • typeCheck

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder typeCheck(Formula<?> formula, ITypeEnvironment tenv)
      Type-checks the given formula and returns the type environment made of the given type environment and the type environment inferred during type-check.
      Parameters:
      formula - a formula to type-check
      tenv - initial type environment
      Returns:
      augmented type environment

    • typeCheck
